_combo: <band(s)> × <optional theme> · vibe: <vibe> · mutator: <mutator>  — a template; replace with your real draw from `crossfade sample`
_concept: Two or three sentences: what this song is and why the combo is interesting. Real band names live here and in the graph for lineage — never in the fields sent to Suno.
title: An Evocative Title (never a band name)
tags: the MUSICAL STYLE as pure sonic descriptors — era, genre, instrumentation, vocal character, production — plus the vibe and ALL performance/arrangement direction (e.g. 'spoken-word bridge', 'gated drums slamming in on the final chorus', 'doubled vocals'). Translate every real band's sound into terms like these; the name never appears.
prompt:
[Intro]

[Verse 1]
Only bare section tags and the words that get sung go in here
No parentheticals, no stage directions, no annotated headers

[Chorus]
Everything about how it sounds belongs in tags, not here
This field is only the lyrics

[Bridge]
Want a spoken bridge? Put spoken-word bridge in tags
and just write the bridge's words under a bare Bridge tag

[Outro]
That's the whole shape
